creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to Jose Alonso Cardenas Marquez from comment #2)
Next update is fine with me.
I'll keep it set to have node/npm at 22 locally in the meantime.
I noticed that the upstream README.md says "node.js >= 18.0".  They seem to be on a monthly release schedule or so.
